nasb.text: He who walks in integrity walks securely, But he who perverts his ways will be found out.

esv.text: Whoever walks in integrity walks securely, but he who makes his ways crooked will be found out.

cnv.text: 行為完全的，步步安穩； 行事彎曲的，終必敗露。

ccb.text: 行正道者活得安稳， 走歪路者终必败露。

csbs.text: 行事纯全的，安然行走； 道路歪邪的，必被显明。
